focus: Price Data Collection and Serving Optimization
performance_issues: Sequential data source fallback causing high latency
SQLite concurrency issues with dividend processing
No connection pooling for database operations
Rate limiting implemented per-source but not globally optimized
Large data transfers (5+ years of daily data) causing timeouts
No streaming responses for large datasets
Memory usage spikes during multi-ticker batch processing
optimization_requests: How to implement parallel data fetching across multiple sources?
Best practices for connection pooling in serverless environment?
Caching strategies to reduce API dependency?
Data compression techniques for large historical datasets?
Streaming responses vs batch processing trade-offs?
Error handling and retry strategies for financial data APIs?
Rate limiting optimization across multiple data sources?
Monitoring and alerting for data source health?

code_samples.main_api: See main.py - FastAPI endpoints with async/await
code_samples.data_fetcher: See cached_data_fetcher.py - Cache-first strategy with gap detection
code_samples.data_sources: See simple_data_sources.py - Individual source implementations with rate limiting
code_samples.cache_manager: SQLite/PostgreSQL managers with intelligent gap detection

constraints.budget: Free tier APIs preferred, minimal infrastructure costs
constraints.reliability: 99.9% uptime target for price data serving
constraints.latency: Sub-2s response time for cached data, sub-10s for fresh data

specific_questions: Should we implement Redis for high-frequency cache access?
Is connection pooling beneficial in serverless functions?
How to handle API rate limits across distributed serverless instances?
Best practices for handling large time-series datasets in memory?
Optimal database schema for financial time-series data?
How to implement real-time data updates efficiently?
Strategies for handling data source failures gracefully?
Memory optimization techniques for pandas DataFrames?
Async vs sync database operations in FastAPI?
How to implement efficient data compression for API responses?
desired_outcomes: Reduce average API response time by 50%
Implement 90%+ cache hit rate for historical data
Reduce API costs by optimizing data source usage
Implement robust error handling and failover
Optimize memory usage for large datasets
Implement efficient data streaming for large responses
